Tuesday, March 1926 · A Fictional Address
Dearest Reader,

SitcomBites

I write to you from memory — from every diner booth, every bar stool, every coffee cup that warmed our favourite fictional hands. Here is a record of all the places we wish we could visit.

With fond nostalgia,
— the kitchen table

Gilmore Girls
✦ Luke's Diner · Stars Hollow, Connecticut

"I need coffee in an IV."
— Lorelai Gilmore, every morning of her life

Stars Hollow
Conn. 06880
"No cell phones. No man buns. No taking pictures of food." Luke Danes didn't make the rules of great diners — he very much did make these rules specifically.
— The sign at Luke's counter · Stars Hollow · est. always
Stars Hollow Favourites
holy grail
☕
Luke's Diner
The heartbeat of Stars Hollow, Connecticut
What they always get
  • ✦Coffee — the best in the universe, bottomless
  • ✦Blueberry Pancakes, Lorelai's eternal request
  • ✦Cheeseburger with everything (Rory's study fuel)
  • ✦Apple Pie, warmed, whipped cream, no sharing
the rules
🧾
Luke's Counter Policy
The most important menu item: the rules
House policies
  • ✦No cell phones — ever, non-negotiable
  • ✦No man buns (Luke made sure of this)
  • ✦Daily Baked Pies: apple, blueberry, cherry, pecan
  • ✦Daily Specials on the chalkboard — ask Luke
morning ritual
🥐
Weston's Bakery
Stars Hollow's cosy pastry cornerstone
Fresh daily
  • ✦Almond Croissant, buttery, flaky, warm
  • ✦Rory's Study Muffin — blueberry, always
  • ✦Cinnamon Roll, oversized and emotional
  • ✦Festival Cake (town celebration edition)
🍳
Al's Pancake World
Somehow, never about pancakes
Today's theme
  • ✦Thai Basil Special (this week: Bangkok)
  • ✦Mystery Country Platter — ask Al
  • ✦Souvlaki — Greek week, apparently
  • ✦Pancakes — unavailable today, always
sookie magic
🍽️
Sookie's Kitchen — Dragonfly Inn
Meals made with love, jazz hands & mild mania
Tonight's menu
  • ✦Wild Mushroom Risotto (Sookie's signature)
  • ✦Lavender Honey Roast Chicken
  • ✦Strawberry Basil Tart — obsessively perfected
  • ✦The Jam That Changed Jackson's Life
📺
The Gilmore Couch Experience
Not a restaurant — spiritually essential
Movie night staples
  • ✦Pizza, ordered in, eaten in the dark
  • ✦Red Vines (non-negotiable viewing snack)
  • ✦Pop Tarts, straight from the box, cold
  • ✦Chinese takeout, still in containers
Brooklyn Nine-Nine
✦ Shaw's Bar · Brooklyn, New York

"Cool cool cool cool cool.
Nine-Nine!! 🍩"

Brooklyn N.Y.
Precinct 99
There is never a bad time for a glazed donut. Jake Peralta has built his entire detective career around this fundamental truth — and he is, in his own words, a genius.
— Jake Peralta · Det. 1st Grade · Brooklyn Nine-Nine
The Precinct Hangouts
squad spot
🍺
Shaw's Bar
The squad's unofficial debrief lounge
Post-shift orders
  • ✦Cold Draft Beer — always the cheapest one
  • ✦Nachos, extra jalapeños — Rosa's doing
  • ✦Boyle Special: imported charcuterie (eye rolls)
  • ✦Gina's Crystal-Charged Matcha (denied)
jake & amy ❤
🥃
The Sip & Stir
Jake & Amy's first date-adjacent spot
The romantic order
  • ✦Whiskey on the Rocks — two straws, sharing
  • ✦The Lemon Twist Cocktail (Amy picked it)
  • ✦Bar Pretzels — Jake ate all of them
  • ✦A second round — because of course
fan fave
🍩
The Glazed Precinct
Jake's unofficial office — corner donut shop
The regulars order
  • ✦Classic Glazed — Jake's eternal, unshakeable order
  • ✦Maple Bacon Long John (Charles recommended it)
  • ✦Strawberry Sprinkle — Rosa's secret favourite
  • ✦Black coffee, no sugar, no joy (also Rosa)
☕
The Briefing Room Cart
Gina's entrepreneurial fantasy — briefly real
Precinct picks
  • ✦Holt's Earl Grey, steeped exactly 4 minutes
  • ✦Scully's Anything Cake Slice
  • ✦Hitchcock's Double Breakfast Burrito
  • ✦Gina's Crystal-Charged Matcha
charles approved
🥩
Boyle's Bistro
Charles's imaginary fine dining dream
Chef's selection
  • ✦Heritage Breed Pork Belly, slow-roasted 36 hrs
  • ✦Hand-rolled Pasta, single wheat varietal
  • ✦Raw Artisanal Cheese Plate
  • ✦Cold Brew Jello Mould — very Charles
🏆
The Precinct Microwave
Scully & Hitchcock's sacred destination
Today's specials
  • ✦Leftover lasagna (mystery origin, no one asks)
  • ✦Day-old sandwich, somehow always delicious
  • ✦Soup that Scully made from scratch
  • ✦Hitchcock's Celebratory Cheese
How I Met Your Mother
✦ MacLaren's Pub · Upper West Side, New York

"Legen — wait for it —
dary. 🍺"

New York N.Y.
Upper West Side
When Barney got sad he stopped being sad and was awesome instead. Then he went directly to MacLaren's and ordered something unreasonably expensive on someone else's tab.
— Barney Stinson · At the booth · Always
The Legendary Spots
the booth
🍺
MacLaren's Pub
The booth downstairs from Ted's apartment
The usual round
  • ✦MacLaren's Draft — the good one, always
  • ✦Basket of Fries (Marshall eats most)
  • ✦Marshall's Massive Burger — unjokingly massive
  • ✦Barney's Scotch on the Rocks (Legendary™)
  • ✦Robin's cider — she misses Timbits
the whole gang
👥
The Booth — Their Booth
Reserved (unofficially) for five people only
Booth rules
  • ✦Group round of beers — always someone's turn
  • ✦Nachos for the table (Barney never chips in)
  • ✦Lily's "one glass of wine" (it's never one)
  • ✦Ted's Long Island Iced Tea (questionable)
legendary (1 night)
🏆
Puzzles Bar
Ted & Barney's bar dream — operated one evening
The short-lived menu
  • ✦The Puzzle — mystery cocktail, Barney's recipe
  • ✦Slap Bet Shot — dangerously strong on purpose
  • ✦The Bro Mosa
  • ✦Lily's "Oops I'm Drunk" Wine
eriksen legend
🥪
Marshall's Kitchen Table
Where Eriksen legends are made — Queens, NY
From scratch, always
  • ✦The Greatest Sandwich Ever Made™
  • ✦Minnesota Tater Tot Hotdish
  • ✦Eriksen Family Chili (recipe classified)
  • ✦Lily's Spaghetti — deceptively good
🍸
The Arcadian Hotel Bar
Where Ted made his most questionable decisions
Regret menu
  • ✦Classic Martini, shaken, architectural
  • ✦Hotel Charcuterie (Barney expensed it)
  • ✦Ted's Order He Regrets By Morning
  • ✦Expensive whiskey "for the conversation"
barney's pick
⭐
Barney's Steakhouse of Choice
Legendary dinner, legendary lies — Midtown
The legendary order
  • ✦32oz Wagyu Porterhouse
  • ✦Truffle Mac & Cheese
  • ✦Bottle of Red, aggressively overpriced
  • ✦The Legendary Lava Cake
Modern Family
✦ The Pritchett Table · Brentwood, Los Angeles

"In Colombia, everything is made with love. And also a lot of salt." — Gloria 🥘

Los Angeles
Brentwood CA
The whole family around one table. The turkey is always thirty minutes late. Gloria saves it every time. This is fine. This is tradition now, and no one would have it any other way.
— The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker-Delgado table · Annually
The Family Tables
annually iconic
🦃
The Annual Pritchett Holiday Table
Goes wrong every year — this is tradition
The disaster menu
  • ✦Turkey (30 minutes late, always forgiven)
  • ✦Gloria's rice & beans — saving the evening
  • ✦Cam's Centrepiece Cake (it falls)
  • ✦Wine — everyone needed significantly more
📱
The Modern Family Couch Night
Diet Coke, Subway, and family chaos on a tablet
Binge night essentials
  • ✦Diet Coke, ice cold, always
  • ✦Subway footlong, debated topping choices
  • ✦Snacks that appear and disappear (Phil)
  • ✦Cookie pie — you are such a cookie pie
gloria's kitchen
🥘
Gloria's Colombian Kitchen
Brentwood, LA — always warm, always incredible
Always on the stove
  • ✦Bandeja Paisa — Jay's absolute favourite
  • ✦Arepas con queso, made fresh every morning
  • ✦Sancocho de gallina — Sunday non-negotiable
  • ✦Mango con sal y limón — Manny's refined habit
🥞
The Dunphy Breakfast Table
Phil's domain of questionable dad cooking
The morning roundup
  • ✦Phil's Famous Waffles (famous mostly to Phil)
  • ✦Haley's Cold Pizza from Last Night
  • ✦Luke's Whatever-Is-In-The-Fridge Sandwich
  • ✦Claire's Sensible Granola Bowl
always dramatic
🍷
Mitchell & Cam's Dinner Party
Always a full theatrical production
The evening programme
  • ✦Cam's Southern Comfort Roast
  • ✦Mitchell's One Permitted Dish
  • ✦Lily's Opinions on Everything Served
  • ✦The Wine Cam Opened at 4pm
jay's domain
🥩
Jay's Backyard Grill
Patriarch-approved outdoor Sunday dining
Grill master's picks
  • ✦Perfectly Grilled Ribeye, no sauce ever
  • ✦BBQ Ribs with Jay's Secret Dry Rub
  • ✦Corn on the cob, slightly burnt (character)
  • ✦Old Fashioned while he grills, obviously
Friends
✦ Central Perk · Greenwich Village, New York

"How you doin'?"
— Joey, to every plate of food he has ever seen 🍕

New York N.Y.
Greenwich Village
Six friends. One orange couch. Bottomless coffee. The gang gathered through breakups, job losses, turkey heads, and unagi — and somehow Central Perk held them all together for a decade.
— Central Perk · Greenwich Village · Every episode
The Regular Spots
the couch is theirs
☕
Central Perk
The orange sofa · Greenwich Village, NYC
The regulars' order
  • ✦House Coffee — bottomless, perfect, always
  • ✦Muffin of the Day — enormous, always gone
  • ✦Gunther's Special latte, made for Rachel
  • ✦Chocolate Chunk Cookie, warm from the back
the real restaurant
🍝
Monica's Kitchen
Apartment 20E — actually the best in NYC
The greatest hits
  • ✦Thanksgiving Moist Maker Sandwich
  • ✦Meatball Sub (Joey's deepest obsession)
  • ✦The Legendary Trifle (accidentally with meat)
  • ✦Mockolate Chip Cookies — experimental, wrong
joey doesn't share
🍕
Joey's Pizza Place
The specific one he refused to share from
His personal portion
  • ✦Extra Large Pepperoni — personal size (Joey)
  • ✦Meatball Slice — sacred, untouchable
  • ✦Garlic Knots, before anyone arrives
  • ✦The Joey Special — two pizzas, obviously
🍳
The Moondance Diner
Where Rachel learned to pour coffee
Rachel's old stomping ground
  • ✦All-Day Breakfast Platter
  • ✦Coffee (Rachel's was bad — she admits it)
  • ✦BLT on White Toast, crispy
  • ✦Cherry Pie Slice, very diner-coded
annually iconic
🦃
The Thanksgiving Table
Annually catastrophic, permanently iconic
The annual menu
  • ✦Monica's Perfect Roast Turkey
  • ✦Sweet Potato Casserole (controversial)
  • ✦Chandler's Cranberry Sauce — canned, he admits
  • ✦Joey's Second Turkey — solo, no regrets
🎂
Phoebe's Baked Goods Cart
The smelly cat musician's baking side quest
From Phoebe with love
  • ✦Grandma Pinkel's Chocolate Chip Cookie
  • ✦Oatmeal Raisin — fiercely defended by Phoebe
  • ✦Vegan Lavender Loaf — a whole era
  • ✦Mystery Muffin — you just have to trust it
Sent with fond nostalgia · All establishments are (mostly) fictional · The longing is entirely real ✦
